hero.heading: Review Management Built for Permanent Makeup

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every PMU Artist Faces

items.heading: Healing phases confuse clients
items.body: Color shifts before it settles, and panic posts follow.

items.heading: One asymmetry photo spreads fast
items.body: Social screenshots hurt before you can respond.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for PMU Artists

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after healed results
items.body: Time the request when pigment looks true.
